case_title: MADRIGAL, ENRIQUE VS ATLAS TOWING SERVICES INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT ATLAS TOWING SERVICES INC.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ATLAS TOWING SERVICES INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADRIGAL, ENRIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATLAS TOWING SERVICES INC. $2,592.28 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,642.28, WILSON L. BAILEY SR. IS DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
